sql_array: CREATE TABLE weekdays (id INT, event_date DATE);
INSERT INTO weekdays (id, event_date) VALUES (1, DATE '2023-12-01');
SELECT dayname(event_date) FROM weekdays WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE weekdays SET event_date = DATE '2023-12-02' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, dayname(event_date) AS weekday_name FROM weekdays;
